'''Deif''' was a member of the [[Brommstaad Mercenaries]]. He was stunned by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and then later captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] during a [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|raid]] on [[Zekka Thyne]]'s [[Zekka Thyne's fortress|fortress]].<ref name="Side Trip" />

==Appearances==
*"[[Side Trip]]" {{Reprint|Side Trip}} {{1st}}
